chapter_title.en: Places Where Prayer is Permissable and Where it is Not Permissable

text: 742 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ بَأْسَ بِالصَّلاَةِ وَ أَنْتَ تَنْظُرُ إِلَى اَلتَّصَاوِيرِ إِذَا كَانَتْ بِعَيْنٍ وَاحِدَةٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.742 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"There is no harm in praying while looking at images if they have only one eye."
